meaning: n.薄雾,疑惑,阴霾vt.使变朦胧,使变糊涂,使劳累vi.变朦胧,变糊涂
examples: They vanished into the haze near the horizon.
Mist was rising, and trees and shrubs began to disappear in a milk-white haze.
The glittering spire atop the tower of the daytime through my window, would no longer be visible now in the early morning haze.
However, the haze of legal issues surrounding EatWith has not stifled interest by prospective hosts.
Then one day the haze lifted and I saw the Pamirs for the first time.
